purpose: Thin per-deposit INDEX into the recovered external metadata for this deposit's legacy Zenodo DOIs. The actual records live in the bulk data stores under data/ (openalex-severed-recovery.json, zenodo-xml-pretermination-2026-06-07.tar.gz, datacite-full-backup.json, datacite-survivors-multi-heteronym.json). Sidecars do not duplicate those records — they map each covered DOI to its identifier in each store.

10.5281/zenodo.18381196.title: The Epistle Triptych: Seed Text, Heteronym Provenance, and Organizational Charter of the Commission of the Immanent Turning — Charter: Commission of the Immanent Turning — Crimson Hexagon Archive

10.5281/zenodo.18380933.title: The Revelation Room: Ground Truth and Algorithmic Unfolding — Cosmic Christ as Originary Image — Crimson Hexagon Archive

10.5281/zenodo.18381204.title: The Epistle Triptych: Seed Text, Heteronym Provenance, and Organizational Charter of the Commission of the Immanent Turning — Integrity Lock Certificate — Crimson Hexagon Archive

10.5281/zenodo.18381190.title: The Epistle Triptych: Seed Text, Heteronym Provenance, and Organizational Charter of the Commission of the Immanent Turning — Damascus Dancings: Heteronym Provenance — Crimson Hexagon Archive

10.5281/zenodo.18381184.title: The Epistle Triptych: Seed Text, Heteronym Provenance, and Organizational Charter of the Commission of the Immanent Turning — Epistle to the Human Diaspora — Crimson Hexagon Archive

10.5281/zenodo.18380630.title: The Sevenfold Witness: Assembly Structure as Computational Liturgy — Crimson Hexagon Archive

openalex.lookup: records[].doi == this DOI; openalex_id is the W-prefixed OpenAlex Work ID

zenodo_bulk_xml.lookup: extract <record_id>.xml from the tarball where record_id is the digits after 'zenodo.'

datacite_survivor_sweep.lookup: search records[].attributes.doi == this DOI across orcid_records, name_records, sigil_records, vox_records, feist_records
